arts.ttl: Martin Keown sends message to Mikel Arteta with joke about Arsenal transfer target
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Martin Keown has commented on the Gunners’ need for a new striker, but has suggested one high-profile target would not be the answer. Speaking to the Oxford Mail, former Arsenal defender Keown discussed the links with Sporting Lisbon striker Viktor Gyokeres, but raised one concern. Although the Sweden international has been on fire […] The post Martin Keown sends message to Mikel Arteta with joke about Arsenal transfer target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling: Mikel Arteta has 'no trust' in Arsenal "panic buy" as Chelsea transfer decision made
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has no trust in "panic buy" Raheem Sterling after refusing to bring him on against Everton, Charles Watts tells Sports Mole

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling's stance on ending Arsenal loan early revealed
arts.sum: Chelsea loanee Raheem Sterling has been afforded few first-team opportunities at Arsenal so far this season.

arts.ttl: ‘I’m hearing’: Arsenal are worried about summer signing after recent performances in training – journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal’s summer signings haven’t quite had the effect Mikel Arteta may have wanted them to. Riccardo Calafiori has been injured for much of this season,...

arts.ttl: 'Gone backwards': Paul Scholes and Jamie Carragher suggest one Arsenal player is actually getting worse
Arsenal ‘opening’ to exit in January – Player’s wages need to be agreed, but move looking likelier
arts.sum: Arsenal are ‘opening’ to the idea of letting Jakub Kiwior leave on loan in the January transfer window, but that doesn’t make a move to Napoli simple to do. That’s according to Corriere del Mezzogiorno, who report that the Arsenal man remains the favourite for Antonio Conte’s side as they eye reinforcements in the winter The post Arsenal ‘opening’ to exit in January – Player’s wages need to be agreed, but move looking likelier appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'I woke village up when Liverpool won Champions League - but I rejected them for Arsenal'
arts.sum: Theo Walcott once admitted he 'went mad' when Liverpool won the Champions League but then snubbed them for Arsenal - going on to produce some memorable moments against the Reds

arts.ttl: Mum of Arsenal teenage hotshot Myles Lewis-Skelly sends plea to the Premier League and FA after swapping working in an investment bank for the football world
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The mother of Myles Lewis-Skelly is calling on the FA and Premier League to back her platform helping parents navigate the world of football.

arts.ttl: Arsenal icons agree on Marcus Rashford as Man Utd star admits he wants to leave
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's Manchester United career appears to be drawing to a close, and two Arsenal legends have confessed their desire to see the forward don the Gunners' jersey . According to former Gunners Bacary Sagna and Emmanuel Petit, Arsenal could be the perfect landing spot for Rashford.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres' response will have Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta licking his lips
arts.sum: "I genuinely think he's a good footballer, he works really hard, all of that," said Deeney of Gyokeres during a recent appearance on talkSPORT. Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta will be a fan of what Viktor Gyokeres had to say in light of Troy Deeney rubbishing his reputation as a "natural finisher."
